name: Grilled Shrimp Wrapped in Bacon
recipeIngredient: 10 Strips bacon; raw, cut into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the radicchio, endive, and lettuce. Tear into bite-size pieces and set aside.
2. Wrap each shrimp tightly in half a strip of bacon.
3. Grill in skillet or over charcoal grill until crisp, 3-5 minutes, turning once. Cover to keep warm.
4. Seed peppers and cut into thin julienne strips. Set aside.
5. Combine oil, vinegar, mustard, and thyme in a jar. Cover and shake well.
6. Place greens and peppers in a bowl. Add shrimp. Toss gently with the vinaigrette.
7. Serve in shallow bowls, arranging greens first, and 5 shrimp on top of the greens.
